name: lark-deck-cyrus
description: End-to-end Cyrus/Lark H5 pitch deck system: recognize uploads, plan, render, audit, rehearse, ingest, and package customer-ready decks.

interface.shortDescription: Recognize, plan, render, audit, rehearse, and ingest H5 pitch decks.
interface.longDescription: Turn customer briefs, uploaded materials, and existing HTML decks into talk-ready Lark/Feishu-style HTML pitch decks through upload recognition, planning, rendering, auditing, pitch rehearsal, and cloud-library ingestion skills.
defaultPrompt: Use lark-deck-cyrus to create a customer pitch deck.
Use deck-auditor to check whether this H5 deck is ready.
Use upload-parser to decompose this PDF/PPT/HTML source material.
Use pitch-simulator to rehearse this deck with the audience.
Use deck-ingestor to save approved slides, assets, and knowledge to the cloud library.
